inline_comments.message: Should gerrit-maven-stage include mvn-poms and mvn-params to match these, in the same way other projects with subprojects do?

Only for the verify and merge. Since only these 2 jobs are using the subprojects. 
But notice that the release-version-java-daily (which is replaced by gerrit-maven-stage) does not uses the subproject variables. Which means, they are using root pom.xml
You can see the reference in 
https://jenkins.onap.org/view/vfc/job/vfc-nfvo-driver-ems-master-release-version-java-daily/configure
Notice this job uses root pom. 

If this release job would have been the {subproject} one, then yes, what you said would have to be done.
